Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-30-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lori Cheshire.
Mark Serlin, Esq. for Plaintiff: Union Bank of California, N.A.
Order waiving live testimony of witness in file.
After hearing the evidence and considering the declaration presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Coast Partners Capital Corp., and Daniel Melgar, Sr. as follows:
Damages $103,284.72
Prejudgment Interest $9,664.16
Attorney's Fees $3,750.00
Costs $1,030.29, for a total of $117,729.17
Judgment signed in open court.
